aviso_entrega.title: ORDER DELIVERY ADVICE
aviso_entrega.introduction: Dear Customer, we sincerely hope that you have received your purchase order and that it has met your expectations without any issues.
aviso_entrega.consultas: If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out.

aviso_embarque.title: SHIPMENT ADVICE
aviso_embarque.introduction: Dear Customer, we would like to inform you that your purchase order will be shipped under the following conditions.
aviso_embarque.consultas: If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out.

aviso_recepcion.title: ORDER RECEIPT ADVICE
aviso_recepcion.introduction: We would like to formally acknowledge the receipt of your purchase order. We will ensure that your order is processed according to your requirements and will keep you updated on its progress.
aviso_recepcion.consultas: If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out.

aviso_disponibilidad.title: AVAILABILITY ADVICE
aviso_disponibilidad.introduction:
We would like to inform you that your purchase order is now available at our transit warehouse located at 2480 Pacifico Street, San Joaquín, Santiago.
Please contact our logistics team at newton.lagos@gelymar.com or maguirre@gelymar.com to arrange for the pickup of your shipment. Thank you.
aviso_disponibilidad.consultas: If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out.
